query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
//| where execution_duration_ms > 30000
| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/1000 as range_s
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s
| if(execution_duration_ms > 1000 * {{slow_seconds}},1,0) as slow
| if(status_message = "Finished successfully",0,1) as fail
| if(scanned_partition_count > 3,1,0) as %"scan ++ part"
| if(data_scanned_bytes > 1 * 1024 *1024*1024*1024,1,0) as %"scan > 1TB"
| if(range_s / (60 * 60 * 24) > 10,1,0) as %"range > 10d" 
// AGGREGATE TO GET STATS
| count as queries,sum(duration_s) as total_sec,sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes_scanned,  pct(duration_s,50) as median_run_s , sum(%"scan ++ part") as %"scan >3 part",sum(%"scan > 1TB") as %"scan > 1TB",sum(slow) as %"slow > 30s",sum(%"range > 10d") as %"range > 10d", sum(fail) as %"fail/cancelled" by user_name
| sort bytes_scanned
| bytes_scanned / 1024/1024/1024 as scan_gb 
| total scan_gb as tgb | 100 * (scan_gb/tgb) as scan_pct | fields -tgb
| total_sec / (60 * 60) as total_hours | fields -bytes_scanned,total_sec
